Home / Projects / Embedded C / System Calls & File I/O

System Calls & File I/O

Low-level POSIX system calls for file and device I/O.

Overview

This section covers POSIX system calls (open, read, write, ioctl, lseek) and how they differ from C standard library wrappers like fopen/fwrite, with practical examples from driver development.

Articles
